blocks.text: Before the draft travels any further, one line I want your read on. The message about the leadership change reads slightly defensive as written, and on a sensitive point that is the phrasing a reporter picks up rather than the substance behind it. I have a softer version ready; I would rather you choose between the two than have me decide it for you.

Everything else is in good shape. Kimberly Le's read of the coverage confirmed the framing we expected, so nothing there changes the approach, and Melissa Zimmerman has the outreach calendar built around the window she mentioned.
If you can mark up the flagged line and send back anything else that sits wrong with you, I will turn a clean version for the {{fact:f:E-2022-001.client}} team by early next week.
